reviewer_feedback.reviewer_text: The staged-rail HTML proof is much better, but the crew still reads too static for a Living Cover. Add visible but restrained foreground human motion.

allowed_motion: small head and shoulder turns implied by whole-figure pivot
arm and torso settling implied by sub-degree skew and rotation
flat contact-shadow shift and scale changes
forbidden_motion: faces, name patches, readable logos, text, or identity likeness
crew_liveliness_revision.clean_launch_pad_read_policy: crew remains foreground human presence below shuttle/crawlerway and left of right rail; no action-scene behavior

sprites.source_area: lower-left/lower-center crew foreground from kept Variant C raster
lower-left/lower-center crew foreground from kept Variant C raster
lower-left/lower-center crew foreground from kept Variant C raster
lower-left/lower-center crew foreground from kept Variant C raster

sections.title: First Warning
sections.summary: A small clue becomes the entry point.

sections.title: Cold Joint
sections.summary: Cold changes how the seal responds.

sections.title: Processed Warning
sections.summary: Familiar risk starts to feel normal.

sections.title: Launch-Night Decision
sections.summary: Evidence must prove more than concern.

sections.title: Recommendation Reversal
sections.summary: The same chain returns a new answer.

player.render_mode_note: Render mode hides interactive controls and exposes window.__setRenderTime for deterministic screenshot capture and future render tests.

layout_revision.subject_occlusion_policy: right rail and overlays stay out of shuttle and crew subject area
layout_revision.video_first_copy_density: active detail layer uses one short summary and one dominant current subbeat; adjacent subbeats appear only when they fit at legible size

legibility_revision.target_context: YouTube 1080p video playback, not interactive web-app reading
legibility_revision.title_policy: title remains roughly the prior active scale
legibility_revision.inactive_text_policy: compact context only; not relied on for critical reading
legibility_revision.small_preview_policy: hide small subtext at tiny preview sizes instead of creating unreadable/dithered text

active_summary.text: Evidence must prove more than concern.

transition_model.typography_scale_transition: removed; active title and compact rows use fixed font sizes
transition_model.rail_crossfade_transition: replaced by stable rail rows plus absolute active-detail layer
transition_model.visual_transition: source-art drift is delayed until after the outgoing-detail settle phase

next_review_question: Review the Apple LTX 2.3 crew motion scout A/B/C contact sheet and reply with keep A, keep B, keep C, tighten, or reject.

sprite_overlay_reject_record.reviewer_text: The sprite-overlay crew-liveliness proof is the wrong approach. It creates ghosted duplicate humans and background patches, making the people feel artificial.
sprite_overlay_reject_record.required_next_action: Use an Apple LTX 2.3 image-to-video motion scout from the kept Variant C full-frame source carrier.
